software_engineer.title: Software Engineer
software_engineer.description: We are looking for a Software Engineer with at least 2 years of experience. Required skills: python, java, sql, git, data structures. Preferred: docker, kubernetes, aws, react, node.js. Minimum education: Bachelor degree.

data_scientist.title: Data Scientist
data_scientist.description: We are looking for a Data Scientist with at least 1 years of experience. Required skills: python, machine learning, statistics, sql, data analysis. Preferred: tensorflow, pytorch, pandas, numpy, data visualization. Minimum education: Master degree.

web_developer.title: Web Developer
web_developer.description: We are looking for a Web Developer with at least 1 years of experience. Required skills: javascript, html, css, react, node.js. Preferred: typescript, vue, angular, mongodb, postgresql. Minimum education: Bachelor degree.

devops_engineer.title: DevOps Engineer
devops_engineer.description: We are looking for a DevOps Engineer with at least 3 years of experience. Required skills: docker, kubernetes, aws, ci/cd, linux. Preferred: terraform, ansible, jenkins, python, bash. Minimum education: Bachelor degree.

ml_engineer.title: Machine Learning Engineer
ml_engineer.description: We are looking for a Machine Learning Engineer with at least 2 years of experience. Required skills: python, machine learning, deep learning, tensorflow, sql. Preferred: pytorch, kubernetes, docker, nlp, computer vision. Minimum education: Master degree.
